Back Home
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 23rd July, 2004 at 20:19 GMT
  
Hey everyone, I'm finally back in the uk, so I will finally be able to get cracking with the website again. Im absolutely nackered at the moment; I couldn't sleep atall on the plane. I will start to fix the basic things tomorrow and will make sure all the media is working before i upload the naruto stuff. So far the corrupt media files I know of are: Dragonball Z movie 5, and Animatrix. If there are any others you know of, please email me.
Another Update
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 19th July, 2004 at 14:34 GMT
  
Hey, just another little update. The situation with the mysql databases are now undercontroll - all the content should now work, were sorry for the wait. I will be able to start work on the website on saturday when i get back to the uk, the first objective will be to clean up all the scrappy things on the layout and to make sure everything works. Then I will start adding the load of content that has been being saved up over the last couple of months.
Update
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Thursday 15th July, 2004 at 17:30 GMT
  
Hey, I'v just spotted the problems with the mysql database. Unfortunately I'm on holiday at the moment, and am inable of finxing it, I have sent in a support ticket to my host, hopefully it will be sorted out soon. Sorry for the inconvenience.
Finally Back Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 12th July, 2004 at 14:13 GMT
  
Hey, Im really sorry It has taken so long to get the site back up and running. We have encountered so many problems over the last month, it's unbelievable. I wont go into the detil; as I'm about to leave the uk to go on vacation to dubai for 12 days, I'm currently sitting in the airport lounge with my pda. I hope you like the new layout; there are several things which still need fixing, but it's just about usable. I think most of the media works, apart from the episodes. I will try and get to a net cafe while im abroad, so i can do a few quick updates, but the majority of the work will have to wait untill I return. My aplologies again, thanks for your patience.
